titleStmt.title: Uppsala, Uppsala University Library, O Etiop. 12
Miracles of Mary with accompanying rhymed stanzas

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: Taʾammǝra Māryām
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ ኣብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ አሐዱ፡ አምላክ፨ ዝንቱ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ተአምሪሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ፡ ትንብልናሃ፡ ይዕቀበነ፡ ለ ወ ኵልነ፡ ሕዝበ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፨
msItem.explicit:
ስብሐት፡ ለኪ፡ ማርያም፡ በአፈ፡ ሰብእ፡ ወመላእክት፡ ስብሐት፡ ለኪ፡ ማርያም፡ በልሳነ፡ ኵሉ፡ ፍጥረት፨
ስብሐት፡ ለኪ፡ ማርያም፡ በምድር፡ ወበሰማያት፨
ስብሐት፡ ለኪ፡ ማርያም፡ በባሕር፡ ወበቀላያት፡ ስብሐተ፡ ውዳሴኪ፡ ዘልፈ፡ አይድዑ፡ ቀደምት፨=፨=፨

msItem.title: First miracle with accompanying stanza
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the preservation of the Church of the Virgin in ʾAṯrīb
Stanza accompanying Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the preservation of the Church of the Virgin in ʾAṯrīb
msItem.note: This is the complete text of the stanza.
msItem.incipit:
ጸወነ፡ ሀገር፡ ጽንዕት፡ ዘኢታንቀለቅል፡ መሠረታ፡ መቅደሰ፡ ቤትኪ፡ ዘአትሪብ፡ ነካር፡ ሥነ፡ ግብረታ፨
መቄዶናዊ፡ መስፍን፡ ሶበ፡ ፈቀደ፡ ይንስታ፤
በ
ከመ፡ ጽሕቂ፡ በአስተፋጥኖ፡ ረድኤታ፡ አድኅንኒ፡ ማርያም፡ እምኵሉ፡ ሐታታ፨=፨=፨

msItem.title: Second miracle with accompanying stanza
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of an Arab chief sparing Christian pilgrims
Stanza accompanying Miracle of Mary: Miracle of an Arab chief sparing Christian pilgrims
msItem.note: This is the complete text of the stanza.
msItem.incipit:
በትረ፡ ዕፀ፡ ልብነት፡ ዘያዕቆብ፡ ለእለ፡ ተጋብኡ፡ ሕዝብ፡ ውስተ፡ ዐፀደ፡ ቤት፡ ርኂብ፨
ለገቢረ፡ በዓል፡ ዮም፡ በብሔረ፡ አትሪብ፨
ዘአድኀንኪዮሙ፡ እምፀብአ፡ ሰይጣን፡ መፅሕብ፡ አድኅንኒ፡ ማርያ፡ እምተኵላ፡ ርኁብ፨

msItem.title: Third miracle with accompanying stanza
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the priest Rizqallā from Cairo by whose prayer stolen belongings of pilgrims where given back
Stanza accompanying Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the priest Rizqallā from Cairo by whose prayer stolen belongings of pilgrims where given back
msItem.note: This is the complete text of the stanza.
msItem.incipit:
ርዝቀላ፡ ቀሲስ፡
ሶበ፡ ኀቤኪ፡ ያንቀዓዱ፡ አንቀጸ፡ ቤትኪ፡ ማርያም፡ እንዘ፡ ይጐደጕዱ፨
ዐረባውያን፡ ሜጡ፡ አልባሰ፡ ሕዝብ፡ ዘሔዱ፨
ካህናትኒ፡ እመልዕልተ፡ ተስላስ፡ ወረዱ፡ ተአምርኪ፡ አንከሩ፡ ወንእዱ፨

msItem.title: Fourth miracle with accompanying stanza
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Anastasius, a deacon of Rome
Stanza accompanying Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Anastasius, a deacon of Rome
msItem.note: This is the complete text of the stanza.
msItem.incipit:
አንቲ፡ ውእቱ፡ አስከሬነ፡ ዕንቍ፡ ዘተኃቱ፡ በከመ፡ ወደሰኪ፡ ዲያቆን፡ በትፍሥሕያት፡ ፭፨
ከመ፡ ቃለ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ ይቤ፡ እስመ፡ ተባረከ፡ ዕለተ፡ ሞቱ፨
ከማሁ፡ ይባርከኒ፡ ሀይለ፡ ተአምርኮኪ፡ ዝንቱ፡ በኀበ፡ ወፈርኩ፡ ኀለሂ፡ አአቱ፨

msItem.title: Fifth miracle with accompanying stanza
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a woman who receives a child after having prayed to Mary at her apparition in Maṭāriya
Stanza accompanying Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a woman who receives a child after having prayed to Mary at her apparition in Maṭāriya
msItem.note: This is the complete text of the stanza.
msItem.incipit:
ማእረረ፡ ተስፋሁ፡ ሥምርት፡ ለዘይዘርእ፡ ጽድቀ፡
ለወልደ፡ ነዳዪት፡ አሐቲ፡ እመልዕልተ፡ ተሥላስ፡ አመ፡ ወድቀ፨
ከመ፡ ተረክበ፡ ጥዑየ፡ እንዘ፡ ኢየሐምም፡ ሕቀ፨
ከማሁ፡ እግዝእትነ፡ ተራድእኒ፡ ጽፉቀ፡ እስመ፡ ተስፋየ፡ አንቲ፡ ወክብርየ፡ ጥቀ፨

msItem.title: Sixth miracle with accompanying stanza
Miracle of Mary: The priest from Nārdin who was accused because he kept a nun in his house
Stanza accompanying Miracle of Mary: The priest from Nārdin who was accused because he kept a nun in his house
msItem.note: This is the complete text of the stanza.
msItem.incipit:
አንቲ፡ ውእቱ፡ ዘጕንደ፡ መንግሥት፡ ጽጌ ፡ ፤
እምአፍሐመ፡ እሳት፡ ውዑይ፡ ዘአድኀንኪዮ፡ ለዓጌ፨
ማርያም፡ ድንግል፡ አትሮንሰ፡ ሰሎሞን፡ ዘቀርነ፡ ነጌ፨
ወልድኪ፡ መሥዋዕተ፡ ሕግ፡ አበሳ፡ ብዙኀን፡ ኀዳጌ፡ ፡ ፤
እስመ፡ ተመሰለ፡ ዘበግዕ፡ ሐርጌ፨

msItem.title: Seventh miracle with accompanying stanza
Miracle of Mary: Homily on a European man who stole the door of the cave in Bethlehem
Stanza accompanying Miracle of Mary: Homily on a European man who stole the door of the cave in Bethlehem
msItem.note: This is the complete text of the stanza.
msItem.incipit:
እግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ወላዲተ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ፈራቂ፡ ዘአድኀንኪዮ፡ እምሕንቀት፡ ለአፍርንጋዊ፡ ሠራቂ፨
ማዕፆ፡ ቤተኪ፡ ሠናየ፡ አመ፡ በጕሕላዌ፡ ይለቂ፨
አድኅነኒ፡ ከመ፡ ከማሁ፡ እመሥገርተ፡ ልሳን፡ ጸያቂ፡ ወበትንባሌኪ፡ ካዕበ፡ ኪያየ፡ አጽድቂ፨

msItem.title: Eighth miracle with accompanying stanza
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Hildephonsus (Dexius) of Toledo
Stanza accompanying Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Hildephonsus (Dexius) of Toledo
msItem.note: This is the complete text of the stanza.
msItem.incipit:
ኦማርያም፡ ወለተ፡ ዳዊት፡ ንጉሥ፡ ዘትትዐጸፊ፡ ብርሃነ፡ ከመ፡ እንተ፡ ልብስ፨
በከመ፡ ወሀብኪዮ፡ ክብረ፡ ለኤጲስ፡ ቆጶስ፨
ሀብኒ፡ እግዝእትየ፡ በቅድመ፡ ኵሉ፡ ሞገስ፡ ወአርፍቅኒ፡ በዓለም፡ ሐዳስ፨

msItem.title: Ninth miracle with accompanying stanza
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a city destroyed by angels
Stanza accompanying Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a city destroyed by angels
msItem.note: This is the complete text of the stanza.
msItem.incipit:
ወአመ፡ ምሕኮ፡ ለሕፃን፡ እመቅሠፍተ፡ መዓት፡ ድሩክ፡ ተዐዲዎ፡ ትእዛዘ፡ ፩መልአክ፨
ወሶበ፡ ስእነ፡ ዐሪገ፡ መንገለ፡ ሉዐሌ፡ ፈለክ፨
በእንቲአኪ፡ ማርያም፡ ደብረ፡ ቀልሞን፡ ሰሊክ፡ መክንያተ፡ ድኂን፡ ኮኖ፡ ሳሙኤል፡ ቡሩክ፨

msItem.title: Tenth miracle with accompanying stanza
Miracle of Mary: Bishop Michael sends Deacon John to help the monks of Dabra Mǝṭmāq celebrate Passion Week
Stanza accompanying Miracle of Mary: Bishop Michael sends Deacon John to help the monks of Dabra Mǝṭmāq celebrate Passion Week
msItem.note: This is the complete text of the stanza.
msItem.incipit:
ዮሐንስ፡ ዲያቆን፡ ድኅረ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ሕግ፡ ተምሕረ፡ ዐምደ፡ ብርሃን፡ ርእየ፡ ኀበ፡ ተልእከ፡ ወሖረ፨
ሥዕለ፡ ማርያም፡ ድንግል፡ እስመ፡ በውስቴቱ፡ ንቡረ፨
ብፁዕ፡ ብእሲ፡ እንተ፡ ኪያሃ፡ አፍቀረ፡ ይሤኒ፡ ደኀሪቱ፡ ወይረክብ፡ ክብረ፨

msItem.title: Eleventh miracle with accompanying stanza
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the water reservoir at the Convent of Mǝṭmāq
Stanza accompanying Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the water reservoir at the Convent of Mǝṭmāq
msItem.note: This is the complete text of the stanza.
msItem.incipit:
ምልኢ፡ ውስተ፡ ኅሊናየ፡ ነፋሰ፡ ፍሥሐ፡ ወተድላ፡ በዕለተ፡ በዓልኪ፡ ቅድመ፡ ዘከመ፡ መልኦ፡ ለዔላ፨
ማርያም፡ ስብሕት፡ በአፈ፡ ቶማስስ፡ ወእብላ፨
መንክር፡ ተአምርኪ፡ ውስተ፡ ምድር፡ ኵላ፡ እስመ፡ ቀላይ፡ ወሀበት፡ ቃላ፨

msItem.title: Twelfth miracle with accompanying stanza
Miracle of Mary: An Arab who contemns St Mary's icon at Dabra Qalamon is punished
Stanza accompanying Miracle of Mary: An Arab who contemns St Mary's icon at Dabra Qalamon is punished
msItem.note: This is the complete text of the stanza.
msItem.incipit:
አሐዱ፡ ብእሲ፡ ለዘዚአኪ፡ ዐይቂና፡ ሶበ፡ ዐ ብ በ የ፡ ሰጊደ፡ እስመ፡ ተዳደቆ፡ ሙስና፨
ይእዜኒ፡ ገብርኪ፡ በአብራከ፡ ልብ፡ ወኅሊና፨
እሰግድ፡ ለኪ፡ ማርያም፡ ወለተ፡ ኢያቄም፡ ወሐና፡ ተአምረ፡ ሕይወት፡ ሰርኂ፡ ኀበ፡ ሖርኩ፡ ፍና፨

msItem.title: Thirteenth miracle with accompanying stanza
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of three Arabs in Rīf and Salomon, abbot of Kalamon
Stanza accompanying Miracle of Mary: Miracle of three Arabs in Rīf and Salomon, abbot of Kalamon
msItem.note: This is the complete text of the stanza.
msItem.incipit:
ስመ፡ ዚአኪ፡ ማር
ያም፡ ጊዜ፡ ጸውዑ፡ ወ ተአምኑ፡ ዐረባውያን፡ ዕደው፡ አመ፡ እምኀይለ፡ ማይ፡ ድኅኑ፨
ሶቤሃ፡ ተሐጕለ፡ እንተ፡ ተሣለቀ፡ በልሳኑ፨
ከማሁ፡ እግዝእትየ፡ ጸላእትኪ፡ አኮኑ፡ ሲሳየ፡ ኀርገጽ፡ ለዝላፉ፡ ይኩኑ፨

msItem.title: Fourteenth miracle with accompanying stanza
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the monk Isaac
Stanza accompanying Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the monk Isaac
msItem.note: This is the complete text of the stanza.
msItem.incipit:
ሰለሥተ፡ ምእተ፡ እንዘ፡ ይሰግድ፡ ቅድመ፡ ሥዕልኪ፡ አመ፡ ዐቀበ፡ ፍጹመ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያንኪ፨
ማርያም፡ ድንግል፡ ተአምረ፡ ሕይወት፡ ብኪ፨
አርእይኒ፡ ገጸ፡ ዚአኪ፡ ወአስምዕኒ፡ ቃልኪ፡ በከመ፡ አርአይኪዮ፡ ቅድመ፡ ለይስሐቅ፡ ገብርኪ፨

msItem.title: Fifteenth miracle with accompanying stanza
Miracle of Mary: The Story of the Cannibal of Qǝmr
Stanza accompanying Miracle of Mary: The Story of the Cannibal of Qǝmr
msItem.note: This is the complete text of the stanza.
msItem.incipit:
ቅድስተ፡ ቅዱሳን፡ ማርያም፡ ዘቤተ፡ መንግሥት፡ ወተክህኖ፡ ጊዜ፡ ጸውዓ፡ ስመኪ፡ እንተ፡ ምስለ፡ ምግባር፡ ወተአምኖ፨ መ
ልአከ፡ ጽልመት፡ ፀዋግ፡ ለኃጥእ፡ ኢይኴንኖ፨ ናሁ፡ በላዔ፡ ሰብእ፡ ከመ፡ ኢይሑር፡ ዕርቃኖ ሕፍነ፡ ማይ፡ መድኀኒተ፡ ኮኖ፨

msItem.title: Sixteenth miracle with accompanying stanza
Miracle of Mary: Homily on a potter from Syria
Stanza accompanying Miracle of Mary: Homily on a potter from Syria
msItem.note: This is the complete text of the stanza.
msItem.incipit:
ዐቢይ፡ ውእቱ፡ ክብረ፡ ዚአኪ፡ በከመ፡ ይቤ፡ ለብሐዊ፡ እስመ፡ ድልወ፡ ኮንኪ፡ ለተወክፎ፡ ቃለ፡ አብ፡ መለኮታዊ፨
ማርያም፡ ድንግል፡ ወ
ለተ፡ ይሁዳ፡ ወሌዊ፨
ዕቀብኒ፡ በእንተ፡ ዝንቱ፡ እመሥገርተ፡ ሰይጣን፡ ነዓዊ፡ ወኀበ፡ ሀሎኩ፡ ምስሌየ፡ ሀልዊ፨

supportDesc.foliation: Foliation in pencil in the upper outer corner.

collation.signatures: Undecorated quire numbers. On , the quire mark is found on in the upper part of the last folio. On , quire marks are found in the upper and lower part of the first folio, and in the upper part of the last folio. On , quire marks are found in upper part of the first folio and in the upper part of the last folio. On , quire marks are found in the upper part of the first folio, and in the upper and lower part of the last folio.

list.item:
1
1, stub before 1 1, stub before 1 1, stub before 1

handNote.desc: According to Katalog über die äthiopischen Handschriften in der Universitätsbibliothek Uppsala, Sowie Anhänge über äthiopische Handschriften in anderen Bibliotheken und in Privatbesitz in SchwedenActa Bibliothecae R. Universitatis UpsaliensisOscarLöfgrenUppsalaAlmqvist & Wiksell1974Acta Bibliothecae R. Universitatis Upsaliensis181835, an "elegant middle-sized hand" (elegante mittelgroße Hand).

decoNote.desc: Simple headbands in black, probably by the same hand that produced UppEt12 element item with id a2.

item.title: Register of the Church feasts for the entire year
item.desc: Due codici di Upsala del <hi rend="italics">Libro etiopico dei Miracoli di Maria</hi>Studi orientalistici in onore di Giorgio Levi Della VidaPubblicazioni dell’Istituto per l’OrienteEnricoCerulliRomaIstituto per l’Oriente1956Pubblicazioni dell’Istituto per l’Oriente52I151–17952170 dates the list to the 17th century on palaeographical grounds.
item.q: እ፩፡ በትረ፡ ሎምዮስ፡ ወዮሐንስ። በ፲፡ ፪፡ ለጥ፡ ማቲዎስ፡ ቅምት። እ፳ወ፪፡ ሎቃስ፡ እ፲፡ ወ፰፡ ለሕዳር፡ ፊ ሊ ል ጶስ፡ እ፬፡ ለታሰስ፡ እንድርያስ፡ እ፬፡ ለጥር፡ ያሐንስ፡ ወልደ፡ ንጓድጓድ፡ እ፳፡ ወ፰፡ ለጥር፡ ቀለምጦስ፡

item.desc: Malkǝʾa maṭlali. Written by a hand that Katalog über die äthiopischen Handschriften in der Universitätsbibliothek Uppsala, Sowie Anhänge über äthiopische Handschriften in anderen Bibliotheken und in Privatbesitz in SchwedenActa Bibliothecae R. Universitatis UpsaliensisOscarLöfgrenUppsalaAlmqvist & Wiksell1974Acta Bibliothecae R. Universitatis Upsaliensis181835 described as a "smaller and somewhat younger" (kleinere, etwas jüngere) hand than UppEt12 element handNote with id h1 Given its placement before UppEt12 element item with id a3, it must antedate 1636–1646.

Historical note on an event that took place between 1636 and 1646. For an edition (with partly different readings than what is presented below), an Italian translation, and a discussion, including of the date, see Due codici di Upsala del <hi rend="italics">Libro etiopico dei Miracoli di Maria</hi>Studi orientalistici in onore di Giorgio Levi Della VidaPubblicazioni dell’Istituto per l’OrienteEnricoCerulliRomaIstituto per l’Oriente1956Pubblicazioni dell’Istituto per l’Oriente52I151–17952175–178.
item.q: ንጽሕፍ፡ ለክሙ፡ ዝክረ፡ ነገር፡ ዘኮነ፡ በመዋዕለ፡ ማቴዎስ፡ ወንጌላዊ፡ ዘገበሩነ፡ ዘመናውያን፡ ሮም፡ ወኀርመን፡ ወግብጽ፡ ዘይሰመ፡ ኔሩዝ፡ በዘመነ፡ ማቴዎስ፡ ጳጳስ፡ ወማርቆስ፡ አቡን፡ በኢትዮጵያ፡ ወዮሐንስ፡ ቄአቡን፡ ቄሰገበዝ፡ በኢየሩሳሌም፡ ፭፡ ዐመት፡ በበ፪፡ ፻፡ ኔሩዝ፡ ይበልዕ፡ ዘመጻእነ። ዕምኢትዮጵያ፡ ነሢአነ፡ ፍተ፡ ኅብስት፡ ኢትርስዑነ፡ ዘንተ፨፨። ዕምብርሃነ፡ ጸጋ፡ አውፅኡኒ፡ በይዕቲ፡ ዘመን፡ በብዝሀ፡ ወርቅ፡ ሰርቅ፡

binding.decoNote: The wooden boards are covered with blind-tooled leather.

history.provenance: The ultimate origin of the manuscript is unknown. According to the colophon on , the manuscript was copied by Mazgaba Dāwit by the order of his teacher (mamhǝru) Baqarna ʾAmbazā during the reign of Śarḍa Dǝngǝl. According to Due codici di Upsala del <hi rend="italics">Libro etiopico dei Miracoli di Maria</hi>Studi orientalistici in onore di Giorgio Levi Della VidaPubblicazioni dell’Istituto per l’OrienteEnricoCerulliRomaIstituto per l’Oriente1956Pubblicazioni dell’Istituto per l’Oriente52I151–17952172, suggests that the manuscript was, at one point, in Jerusalem, but this has been questioned by Katalog über die äthiopischen Handschriften in der Universitätsbibliothek Uppsala, Sowie Anhänge über äthiopische Handschriften in anderen Bibliotheken und in Privatbesitz in SchwedenActa Bibliothecae R. Universitatis UpsaliensisOscarLöfgrenUppsalaAlmqvist & Wiksell1974Acta Bibliothecae R. Universitatis Upsaliensis18187, who points out that the note might have been written in Egypt by someone travelling from the Holy Land. The manuscript made its earliest certain appearance in Cairo in 1664, when it served as a Vorlage for parts of BNCFcod83, a manuscript scribed by Johann-Michael Wansleben (see Due codici di Upsala del <hi rend="italics">Libro etiopico dei Miracoli di Maria</hi>Studi orientalistici in onore di Giorgio Levi Della VidaPubblicazioni dell’Istituto per l’OrienteEnricoCerulliRomaIstituto per l’Oriente1956Pubblicazioni dell’Istituto per l’Oriente52I151–17952172; Katalog über die äthiopischen Handschriften in der Universitätsbibliothek Uppsala, Sowie Anhänge über äthiopische Handschriften in anderen Bibliotheken und in Privatbesitz in SchwedenActa Bibliothecae R. Universitatis UpsaliensisOscarLöfgrenUppsalaAlmqvist & Wiksell1974Acta Bibliothecae R. Universitatis Upsaliensis181899–100). As shown by I manoscritti etiopici di J.M. Wansleben nella Biblioteca Nazionale Centrale di FirenzeRassegna di Studi EtiopiciAlessandroBausi199133 (1989)5-33http://www.jstor.org/stable/4129280829 both and were copied. In 1716, the manuscript was acquired by Henrik Benzelius, presumably in Cairo (although both Cairo and Constantinople are mentioned in Nova literariaActa literaria SveciaeJohannes HenricusWerner17201240-2462024-07-03https://books.google.se/books?id=m3plAAAAcAAJ&hl=sv&pg=PP1#v=onepage&q&f=false242; see Katalog über die äthiopischen Handschriften in der Universitätsbibliothek Uppsala, Sowie Anhänge über äthiopische Handschriften in anderen Bibliotheken und in Privatbesitz in SchwedenActa Bibliothecae R. Universitatis UpsaliensisOscarLöfgrenUppsalaAlmqvist & Wiksell1974Acta Bibliothecae R. Universitatis Upsaliensis18187 and Die Abessinischen Handschriften der Königl. Universitätsbibliothek zu UpsalaZeitschrift der Deutschen Morgenländischen GesellschaftK.V.Zetterstéen189953508–5202024-07-03https://menadoc.bibliothek.uni-halle.de/dmg/periodical/titleinfo/63139508).
history.acquisition: The manuscript had probably reached its current repository at some point before 1720, when it was listed in Nova literariaActa literaria SveciaeJohannes HenricusWerner17201240-2462024-07-03https://books.google.se/books?id=m3plAAAAcAAJ&hl=sv&pg=PP1#v=onepage&q&f=false242 (for a discussion of certain complications, see Katalog über die äthiopischen Handschriften in der Universitätsbibliothek Uppsala, Sowie Anhänge über äthiopische Handschriften in anderen Bibliotheken und in Privatbesitz in SchwedenActa Bibliothecae R. Universitatis UpsaliensisOscarLöfgrenUppsalaAlmqvist & Wiksell1974Acta Bibliothecae R. Universitatis Upsaliensis1818991).

bibl.title: Katalog über die äthiopischen Handschriften in der Universitätsbibliothek Uppsala, Sowie Anhänge über äthiopische Handschriften in anderen Bibliotheken und in Privatbesitz in Schweden
Acta Bibliothecae R. Universitatis Upsaliensis
Die Abessinischen Handschriften der Königl. Universitätsbibliothek zu Upsala
Zeitschrift der Deutschen Morgenländischen Gesellschaft
Beta maṣāḥǝft: Manuscripts of Ethiopia and Eritrea
The Princeton Ethiopian, Eritrean, and Egyptian Miracles of Mary
Johann Michael Wansleben’s Manuscripts and Texts. An Update

Essays in Ethiopian Manuscript Studies. Proceedings of the International Conference Manuscripts and Texts, Languages and Contexts: The Transmission of Knowledge in the Horn of Africa, Hamburg, 17–19 July 2014
Supplement to Aethiopica
I manoscritti etiopici di J.M. Wansleben nella Biblioteca Nazionale Centrale di Firenze
Rassegna di Studi Etiopici
Due codici di Upsala del <hi rend="italics">Libro etiopico dei Miracoli di Maria</hi>
Studi orientalistici in onore di Giorgio Levi Della Vida
Pubblicazioni dell’Istituto per l’Oriente

tagsDecl.rendition: Red ink is used partially in the rubrication of punctuation and numerals.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

lg.l: መቅደሰ፡ ቤትኪ፡ ዘአትሪብ፡ ነካር፡ ሥነ፡ ግብረታ፨
ለእለ፡ ተጋብኡ፡ ሕዝብ፡ ውስተ፡ ዐፀደ፡ ቤት፡ ርኂብ፨
ከመ፡ ቃለ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ ይቤ፡ እስመ፡ ተባረከ፡ ዕለተ፡ ሞቱ፨
ለወልደ፡ ነዳዪት፡ አሐቲ፡ እመልዕልተ፡ ተሥላስ፡ አመ፡ ወድቀ፨
ከመ፡ ተረክበ፡ ጥዑየ፡ እንዘ፡ ኢየሐምም፡ ሕቀ፨
ማርያም፡ ድንግል፡ አትሮንሰ፡ ሰሎሞን፡ ዘቀርነ፡ ነጌ፨
ወልድኪ፡ መሥዋዕተ፡ ሕግ፡ አበሳ፡ ብዙኀን፡ ኀዳጌ፡ ፡ ፤
ማዕፆ፡ ቤተኪ፡ ሠናየ፡ አመ፡ በጕሕላዌ፡ ይለቂ፨
አድኅነኒ፡ ከመ፡ ከማሁ፡ እመሥገርተ፡ ልሳን፡ ጸያቂ፡
ወአመ፡ ምሕኮ፡ ለሕፃን፡ እመቅሠፍተ፡ መዓት፡ ድሩክ፡
ወሶበ፡ ስእነ፡ ዐሪገ፡ መንገለ፡ ሉዐሌ፡ ፈለክ፨
ዮሐንስ፡ ዲያቆን፡ ድኅረ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ሕግ፡ ተምሕረ፡
ዐምደ፡ ብርሃን፡ ርእየ፡ ኀበ፡ ተልእከ፡ ወሖረ፨
ሥዕለ፡ ማርያም፡ ድንግል፡ እስመ፡ በውስቴቱ፡ ንቡረ፨
ምልኢ፡ ውስተ፡ ኅሊናየ፡ ነፋሰ፡ ፍሥሐ፡ ወተድላ፡
በዕለተ፡ በዓልኪ፡ ቅድመ፡ ዘከመ፡ መልኦ፡ ለዔላ፨
ሶበ፡ ዐ ብ በ የ፡ ሰጊደ፡ እስመ፡ ተዳደቆ፡ ሙስና፨
እሰግድ፡ ለኪ፡ ማርያም፡ ወለተ፡ ኢያቄም፡ ወሐና፡
ተአምረ፡ ሕይወት፡ ሰርኂ፡ ኀበ፡ ሖርኩ፡ ፍና፨

ስመ፡ ዚአኪ፡ ማር
ያም፡ ጊዜ፡ ጸውዑ፡ ወ ተአምኑ፡
ዐረባውያን፡ ዕደው፡ አመ፡ እምኀይለ፡ ማይ፡ ድኅኑ፨
ሰለሥተ፡ ምእተ፡ እንዘ፡ ይሰግድ፡ ቅድመ፡ ሥዕልኪ፡
ጊዜ፡ ጸውዓ፡ ስመኪ፡ እንተ፡ ምስለ፡ ምግባር፡ ወተአምኖ፨

መ
ልአከ፡ ጽልመት፡ ፀዋግ፡ ለኃጥእ፡ ኢይኴንኖ፨
ናሁ፡ በላዔ፡ ሰብእ፡ ከመ፡ ኢይሑር፡ ዕርቃኖ
ዐቢይ፡ ውእቱ፡ ክብረ፡ ዚአኪ፡ በከመ፡ ይቤ፡ ለብሐዊ፡
እስመ፡ ድልወ፡ ኮንኪ፡ ለተወክፎ፡ ቃለ፡ አብ፡ መለኮታዊ፨

ማርያም፡ ድንግል፡ ወ
ለተ፡ ይሁዳ፡ ወሌዊ፨
ዕቀብኒ፡ በእንተ፡ ዝንቱ፡ እመሥገርተ፡ ሰይጣን፡ ነዓዊ፡
